/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/ApiGateway.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ApiGateway.dir/src/client/OrderClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ApiGateway.dir/src/client/HttpClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ApiGateway.dir/src/client/RestaurantClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ApiGateway.dir/src/client/UserClient.cpp.o -o ApiGateway  ../../common/libCommon.a /workspaces/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libcurl-d.a /workspaces/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libsqlite3.a /workspaces/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libargon2.a /workspaces/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libssl.a /workspaces/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libcrypto.a -ldl /workspaces/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/lib/libz.a
